layout.description: Left column (hidden on small mobile, or acting as a small header) contains a full-bleed luxury bathroom photo with a dark gradient overlay and the logo. Right column takes up 50-60% width and houses a centered, distraction-free white card for the quiz.
layout.spacing: p-8 md:p-12 inside the quiz container. gap-6 between elements.

components.quiz_container: bg-white shadow-2xl shadow-slate-200/50 border border-slate-100 rounded-xl overflow-hidden relative w-full max-w-xl mx-auto
components.progress_bar: absolute top-0 left-0 h-1.5 bg-[#FF6C00] transition-all duration-500 ease-out
components.selection_card: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 border-2 border-slate-100 rounded-lg cursor-pointer hover:border-[#003A75]/30 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all data-[state=active]:border-[#003A75] data-[state=active]:bg-[#003A75]/5 text-center gap-3
components.selection_row: w-full flex items-center p-5 border-2 border-slate-100 rounded-lg cursor-pointer hover:border-[#003A75]/30 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all data-[state=active]:border-[#003A75] data-[state=active]:bg-[#003A75]/5 text-left text-lg font-medium text-slate-700
components.button_primary: w-full h-14 bg-[#FF6C00] hover:bg-[#E56000] text-white rounded-lg font-bold text-lg transition-colors shadow-lg shadow-[#FF6C00]/20 flex items-center justify-center
components.input_field: h-12 rounded-lg border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#003A75]/20 focus:border-[#003A75] transition-all

images.description: Elegant modern bathroom. Use as the left-side cover image.

steps: Step 1: Home Type -> grid of 4 cards with icons (Home, Building, Caravan/Trailer, Building2).
Step 2: Timeline -> 4 vertical rows (ASAP, This Month, Next Month, Unsure).
Step 3: Address -> Standard form inputs: Home Address, City, Zipcode.
Step 4: Contact Info -> Full Name, Phone, Email. Submit button triggers webhook.
Step 5: Booking -> Shadcn Calendar (max 5 days out) + Time Slots (10am, 2pm, 6pm) -> Confirmation message.

instructions_to_main_agent: Extend tailwind.config.js with colors: brand-blue: '#003A75', brand-orange: '#FF6C00'.
Install Google Fonts 'Outfit' (headings) and 'Manrope' (body) via index.css.
Use Shadcn Form, Input, Button, and Calendar components.
Build a responsive split layout: md:grid md:grid-cols-2 min-h-screen. Left is the image + logo + phone number overlay. Right is a flex-center container for the quiz card.
Quiz card MUST have a top progress bar mapping to the 5 steps.
Ensure the Calendar allows selecting dates from today up to 5 days in the future. No excluded days.
Include data-testid attributes on all buttons, inputs, and selectable cards.
